finding: removing A3 (concept clustering) collapses the entire conceptual edifice; the information-theoretic core survives removal of all five

removals.on_removal: rebuild at lemma/word: information-theoretic invariants HOLD (residual, coherence); vocabulary-based findings (methodology, reality, decision) shift
removals.statement: roots are the meaningful unit of analysis

removals.on_removal: remove semantic-similarity: concepts cannot form — concept partition and everything downstream collapses; coherence-beyond-null still measurable directly
remove concept-clustering-is-meaningful: concepts/identities/principles/semantics/world-model/methodology become method-relative (Phase 11 ARI 0.22) — STRONG collapse
removals.statement: clustering boundaries (concepts) are meaningful, not arbitrary

removals.on_removal: remove proposition-edges-are-real: 65% is frequency (Phase 17); motifs 3/13 survive; grammar/compression/consistency-significance weaken
remove graph-is-appropriate: held-out prediction fails (Phase P) — the graph has no generalizable information beyond frequency
removals.statement: the graph representation is the appropriate model
